name: The Bogey Room - Private Golf Simulator
about: The Bogey Room is a private, member-only indoor golf lounge operating across three locations in the Pacific Northwest (Spokane Valley, WA; Sandpoint, ID; Hayden, ID). It offers exclusive access to state-of-the-art golf simulators in a luxury lounge environment designed for year-round play, practice, and community events. The venue operates on a membership basis with an initiation fee and monthly dues, providing unlimited access and the ability to bring guests. Pricing varies by location and does not require long-term contracts.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 key card access and mobile booking for ultimate convenience
State-of-the-art Uneekor technology with 100+ world-class courses
Bi-monthly leagues, member tournaments, and a strong community focus

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allowed; members can bring their own food and drink. Fridge available for storage during bookings. No eating or drinking on the turf.
BYOB policy allowed; members can bring their own alcohol.

simulator_hardware.notes: Uneekor Launch Monitors, noted for being less than 1% off in accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need to be a member to play?
faq.answer: Yes, membership is required to enjoy the golf lounge. The only exception is if you are a guest of a member.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a private lounge where you can bring your own food and drink. A fridge is available for storage during your booking. Please do not eat or drink on the turf.

faq.question: What are the lounge hours?
faq.answer: As a private lounge with 24/7 key card access, members can play at any time. However, walk-ins are allowed, though a booking will take precedence.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Bogey Room is described as family-friendly and encourages a community environment suitable for families.
